entity.label: Adonijah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite sent with the princes to teach the book of the law to the inhabitants of Judah (2 Chr. 17:8).

nodes.label: Adonijah
nodes.description: A Levite sent with the princes to teach the book of the law to the inhabitants of Judah (2 Chr. 17:8).

verses.text: And with them he sent Levites, even Shemaiah, and Nethaniah, and Zebadiah, and Asahel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehonathan, and Adonijah, and Tobijah, and Tobadonijah, Levites; and with them Elishama and Jehoram, priests.
